name: Olive Garden Apple Praline Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Red delicious apples (peeled and cored, diced 1/2-inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, melt butter. Stir in the crumbs and sugar until thoroughly blended.
2. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
3. For the apple mix, melt butter over low heat in a Dutch oven. Add brown sugar, apples, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice.
4. Simmer over low heat until apples are soft but still hold their shape. Cool mixture to room temperature and reserve.
5. For the praline topping, mix all ingredients together with a fork until well incorporated. Reserve.
6. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, cream sugar and cream cheese on medium speed until light and fluffy.
7. Beat in eggs one at a time until smooth. Add cream and continue beating until mixture is thick and creamy.
8. Gently stir in the cooled apple mix by hand. Pour into prepared springform pan.
9. Spread praline topping over the top. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
10. Allow to cool to room temperature before removing the sides of the pan. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Garnish with whipped cream.
